name: Broccoli & Garlic Pasta
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the linguine according to package directions.
2. Meanwhile, in a skillet over medium heat, cook the broccoli and garlic in hot oil for 2 minutes.
3. Add the broth and tomatoes; bring to a boil and cook until tender, about 6 minutes.
4. Drain the pasta and place it in a serving bowl.
5. Top with the broccoli mixture, red pepper flakes, and cheese.
6. Toss well. Serve with Garlic Bread and Spring Salad.
